name: All In One Summer Sports VR

reviews.review_description: Bro this game gets sooo much hate it’s peak the climbing is good

It is not bad, however there is  no support from the developers and i know i should not expect great physics, but for example when you are swimming, if you don't even move your body or even your arms your avatar still swims and it even won the race with me just standing still, but as i said the developers are non responsive.
Needs snap to turn ASAP

All right, the game is not perfect and I don't really like the swimming games, although the waterpolo is fun. But the skeet shooting is worth the price of entry. I can't understand how this was done so well but it is an extremely well executed and fun activity to participate in with a friend or a stranger. I got it while it was 50% off so even though I don't like all the games, I am still going to keep it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the good review.
Water park, clay shooting, pistol shooting, etc.
It was created to be easy and simple to play.
Please tell me what you are dissatisfied with.
We will fix it as much as possible.
thank you

reviews.review_description: Clay Pigeon and fishing

**All In One Sports VR** offers a mixed experience with a range of sports. Archery is the standout mode, being both excellent and immersive. Basketball and Volleyball are fun but have minor flaws. Baseball is enjoyable but tough, requiring precision. Squash is similar to Tennis but didn't resonate as strongly. Tennis, however, is overly difficult and frustrating. Golf is particularly dull due to poor graphics, lacking visual elements like trees and ponds. A general issue across most sports, except Archery, is the claustrophobic feeling in the environments, which detracts from the overall experience.


**All In One Summer Sports VR** is an improvement over its predecessor, with more activities and a generally more joyful atmosphere. Jet Ski stands out as the most fun, with multiple maps adding variety. Frisbee is simple yet enjoyable. Beach Volleyball offers a decent experience with easier AI compared to the original. However, Pistol Shooting, Water Basketball, and Water Polo are all difficult and frustrating, with little room for learning the controls. Swimming is fun, but it is also a miss opportunity to teach how to actually swim. Fishing feels repetitive and boring, and Cycling is overly hard. The biggest disappointment is the Water Park, which is lifeless, tedious due to an fee to everything, and needs more engaging elements like a crowd or more interactive features and easier access to the slices.

**Summary**: All In One Sports VR provides a decent experience with some standout modes, despite its flaws. All In One Summer Sports VR adds variety and improves on the original, but difficulty spikes and underwhelming modes like Water Park and Fishing prevent it from reaching its full potential. Choose the first game for a more consistent experience or the second if you’re looking for more variety, but be prepared for some challenges.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback on All In One Sports VR and All In One Summer Sports VR.

We're glad you enjoyed modes like Archery and Jet Ski.

We acknowledge the difficulties in Tennis, Water Park, and other modes, and we'll work on improving these areas.

Your comments on the environments and gameplay challenges are valuable, and we'll consider them for future updates.

We appreciate your input and will strive to enhance the overall experience. If you have more suggestions, feel free to share!

Playing sitting down is impossible to turn without it.  As of now most of it is unplayable without being able to turn.

developer_response.body: We will positively consider adding rotation through an internal meeting.

Looks like I really do regret buying this.

I'll solve why the jet ski wasn't controlled if you show me a screenshot or video.
Thank you.

reviews.review_title: Fun for the young or old.
reviews.review_description:
Ok  it would be 5 stars if I played online, but I don't.
Wish you could have a practice mode, though as such. Make it so much better. Ok after a game, it's only one click to restart a round. But for me, short rounds are no good.

Favourite has to be speed boat race, glad it was 2 laps, gave it length.
I think the dev, with work, could turn it into a fully fledged standalone game.

Only played each thing once, but all seemed to be glitch free and smooth.
With more time on it playing, I think I will really enjoy most of the games on here.
Apart from fishing, as I play real vr fishing. Otherwise it would be OK.
Not really bought it for me, the younger family members will love it.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your good evaluation.
I'll keep updating your little family to like it.

reviews.review_description:
The All-in-One Summer Sports VR app is awesome. The variety of sports available is fantastic, offering hours of immersive fun. The graphics are top-notch, and the gameplay is incredibly smooth. The app truly captures the essence of summer activities, making you feel like you're right there in the action.

I also love the All-in-One Sports app, and together, these two apps offer a hours of fun. Remind me a lot of the Wii sports apps, but far better. If the developers are considering adding a third app in the future, I'd be thrilled to see disc golf, cam jam, axe throwing, frisbee, cornhole, dodgeball, and tetherball included. 

Overall, the All-in-One Summer Sports VR app is a must-have.

I can't wait to see what the developers come up with next!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the good review.
There are no plans for new titles yet.
We plan to add new items and new features to the existing all in one and summer.

MR is also an area we are interested in.
We will consider that.

reviews.review_description: Great Game!! 👍🏼

developer_response.body: Thank you for the good evaluation.

reviews.review_description:
I was expecting the different sports to be pretty basic or not good since so many of them were jam-packed into one game. The game positively surprised me though. 

Volleyball was better than many other standalone volleyball VR games I've tried. Both bike racing and jet ski racing was fun and felt like a light version of mario kart games. With bike you had to do the biking motion, which was a good excercise!

Water basketball was super interesting. However I did not know how to play it properly. 

Frisbee throw was also cool and the throwing mechanics were done super well. However I had an issue where the tutorial menu stayed on during the gameplay so I could not see the targets.

All in all, if you like sports games in VR, this is a really valuable game to get. Kinda arcade-like more than realistic but really fun. If you have friends who have VR headsets, I'd imagine this being great. Single play against AI opponents will probably only entertain you for awhile but not keep you coming back to it. Against and with real people it's a proper fun party!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your positive review of summer.
We're currently developing other items for convenience
Don't worry.
The game will be activated.

reviews.review_title: More Sports like Wii in VR
reviews.review_description:
Another incredible Sports game from this dev. If you still like Wii Sports or the Switch ones, you will like this VR Sports so much. Easy to play but difficult to master. My preferred sports are cycling (you need strong arms to win), swimming and Skyjet (very good although I don't like the outside see when you're jumping). All games are well done and enjoyable. I'm sure Appnori will update to make little bugs dissapear, as they did on the All-In-One Sports games (I recommend this previous game if you don't know).
Maybe we have a third part of sports games? A suggestion: Wish it's a Winter Sports one. Skyjump should be incredible, Slalom, Snowboard, Curling, Ice-hockey, Bobsleigh, Ice-skating. This could be amazing.
I was talking about Summer Sports, didn't I? This is a really good collection of games to play alone against IA (good for practise) or with other players (invite them or play with anyone else).

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your positive review of summer.
Winter Sports One is still up in the air.
Convenience and other events are currently being developed.
I'll try to update it quickly. Please wait
